section.title: Institute Leadership
section.description: Presented as institutional tiers to communicate governance structure and leadership credibility.

phase2.heroBody: Strategic partnerships allow HMIOSS to connect education, defence readiness, institutional credibility, and community service into one coordinated ecosystem.

rationale.title: Why Strategic Partnerships Matter
rationale.description: HMIOSS builds partnerships to connect leadership development, education, industry exposure, and community-facing outcomes through one coordinated ecosystem.

opportunities.title: Partner With HMIOSS
opportunities.description: Explore the partnership formats that strengthen talent development, leadership formation, and real-world opportunity pathways across the HMIOSS ecosystem.

categories.title: Universities
categories.summary: Academic collaboration that strengthens talent development and qualification pathways.
categories.value: Connect formal education with leadership development and future-ready pathways.

categories.title: Training Providers
categories.summary: Specialist providers that expand applied learning and professional readiness.
categories.value: Add practical skills and industry-aligned learning experiences.

categories.title: Industry Partners
categories.summary: Industry collaborations that improve exposure, employability, and real-world understanding.
categories.value: Create career visibility and professional relevance for students.

categories.title: Defence & Security Partners
categories.summary: Structured partnerships that strengthen discipline, resilience, and operational awareness.
categories.value: Support leadership growth through high-discipline environments.

categories.title: Community Organisations
categories.summary: Community-linked collaborations that turn leadership training into visible public contribution.
categories.value: Translate education into practical civic impact.

categories.title: CSR Partners
categories.summary: CSR-aligned organisations that want to support youth development and leadership pathways.
categories.value: Connect institutional development goals with measurable social outcomes.

phase2.heroBody: The HMIOSS flagship programme combines leadership development, career development, industry exposure, academic qualification, and professional qualification into one integrated opportunity pathway.
phase2.heroStrapline: One Academic Qualification. One Professional Qualification. One Integrated Career Pathway.
heroHighlights: Dual academic and professional credential structure

pathway.title: Career Pathways
pathway.description: Move from student entry to recognised progression through a structured leadership and opportunity pathway.

items.title: Student
items.description: Begin with a clear pathway into leadership and opportunity.

items.title: Training
items.description: Build capability through integrated academic and professional learning.

items.title: Industry Exposure
items.description: Gain applied understanding through partner-linked environments.

items.title: Leadership Development

items.description: Progress into clearer next-step pathways after completion.

whyThisProgramme.title: Why This Programme
whyThisProgramme.description: This flagship pathway turns study into a clearer leadership and career opportunity journey.
points: Career-aligned learning that connects study with opportunity
A dual-credential structure that adds academic and professional value

industryExposure.title: Industry Exposure
industryExposure.description: Students build confidence through structured exposure to real operational and professional environments.

roleOfHmioss.title: Role of HMIOSS
roleOfHmioss.description: HMIOSS anchors the programme in leadership formation, mentorship, and institutional belonging.

roleOfGenovasi.title: Role of Genovasi
roleOfGenovasi.description: Genovasi supports the academic pathway with recognised structure, standards, and learning delivery.

entryRequirements.title: Entry Requirements
entryRequirements.description: The programme is designed for motivated applicants who want structured growth and recognised progression.

cta.title: Apply Now
cta.description: Start your HMIOSS leadership journey or speak with the team to confirm the right next step for your goals.

news.title: News & Events
news.subtitle: Updates, activities, and visits
news.sectionDescription: Track media coverage, official announcements, and upcoming engagements across the institute.

join.title: Join Us
join.subtitle: Membership & community impact
join.intro: Join HMIOSS to access structured development, strategic networks, and opportunities for service-oriented leadership.
join.conversionDescription: Training access, networking, business matching, and scholarship pathways.

journey.title: How Membership Progresses
journey.description: From enquiry to active participation, membership is structured as a guided pathway into learning, leadership, and service.

items.title: Submit Your Interest
items.description: Tell us about your background, goals, and the kind of HMIOSS engagement you want to pursue.

items.title: Application Review
items.description: Our team reviews your membership type, interests, and the best-fit pathway for meaningful involvement.

items.title: Onboarding & Orientation
items.description: Approved applicants receive orientation, programme visibility, and introductions to the HMIOSS community.

items.title: Participate & Grow
items.description: Members join programmes, events, and service opportunities that deepen leadership and institutional contribution.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about membership, onboarding, and the opportunities available through HMIOSS.

items.question: Who can apply for membership?
items.answer: Individuals, professionals, students, and organisations aligned with HMIOSS values and mission may apply under the available membership categories.

items.question: How long does the review process take?
items.answer: Review timelines vary by application type, but the secretariat aims to respond with next steps after the initial assessment is complete.

items.question: What happens after I join?
items.answer: Members receive onboarding guidance and can begin engaging with programmes, events, networking, and service-oriented activities that fit their profile.
